name: Confirmation Pending Verification
description: Explains the provisional appointment status clearly and calmly. Ensures the patient understands their appointment is scheduled but insurance verification is still in progress.
response_goals: Reassure the patient that their spot is held
Set realistic expectations about the verification timeline
Avoid creating anxiety about the appointment status
Make the patient feel taken care of

steps.name: confirm_appointment_is_set
steps.description: Make it clear the appointment is on the calendar.
guidelines: Lead with the positive: their appointment is scheduled
Use language like 'You're all set for [date/time]'
Don't lead with the caveat about verification
The appointment IS real -- verification is a separate process

steps.name: explain_verification_process
steps.description: Briefly explain what happens next with insurance.
guidelines: Keep it simple: 'Our team is verifying your insurance benefits now'
Frame it as something the clinic is doing FOR them
Don't use jargon like 'pre-authorization' or 'eligibility check'
Mention the typical timeline: 1-2 business days

steps.name: set_expectations
steps.description: Let them know what to expect and when.
guidelines: They'll receive a confirmation with benefit details once verified
They'll know what to expect cost-wise before the appointment
If there are any issues, the clinic will reach out
Their appointment time is secured regardless

common_concerns.what_if_not_covered: If your plan doesn't cover the visit, our team will reach out to discuss your options before the appointment. No surprises.
common_concerns.will_I_lose_my_spot: Your appointment time is reserved for you. The verification doesn't affect your spot.
common_concerns.how_long_does_it_take: We usually have your benefits verified within 1-2 business days.
common_concerns.do_I_need_to_do_anything: Nope! We take care of the verification on our end. We'll reach out if we need anything from you.

steps.name: warm_close
steps.description: Close the conversation with confidence and warmth.
guidelines: Reinforce that everything is in good hands
Remind them they can reach out with any questions
Express that you look forward to seeing them

status_terminology.note: The word 'pending' creates unnecessary anxiety. The appointment IS scheduled. Verification is a separate administrative process.

humanization_overrides.confirmation_template:
Great — you're confirmed for your appointment on {DAY_DATE} at {TIME} at our {LOCATION} location.
You'll receive a callback within the next business day to reconfirm once your insurance is verified.

conversation.message: You're all set for Wednesday at 10:00 AM at our Troy location! Our team is verifying your Blue Cross benefits now -- you'll get a confirmation with all the details within a day or two. If you have any questions before then, just text us here. We look forward to seeing you, Sarah!

sample_conversations.scenario: Patient asks about status a day later

conversation.message: Hi, I booked an appointment yesterday but I haven't heard anything about my insurance yet

Hi Sarah! Your appointment for Wednesday at 10:00 AM is all set. Our team is still working on verifying your benefits -- it usually takes 1-2 business days, so you should hear from us soon. Your spot is reserved either way. I'll make a note to have someone follow up with you today if possible!
